content.text: I found the RSX for-loop writer uses `quote::ToTokens` directly for the loop pattern, which is the likely source of the comma spacing because token streams stringify punctuation with surrounding spaces. Next I’m adding a temporary regression test to reproduce it before changing the formatter.

content.text:
Implemented the fix in `packages/autofmt/src/writer.rs`.

What changed:
- `write_for_loop` now detects tuple patterns (`Pat::Tuple`) and formats them through the existing expression formatter instead of directly using `TokenStream::to_string()`.
- This preserves rustfmt-style comma spacing, producing:
  ```rust
  for (index, name, value) in data {
  ```
  instead of:
  ```rust
  for (index , name , value) in data {
  ```

Validation:
- Added a temporary reproduction case to `packages/autofmt/tests/samples/ifchain_forloop.rsx`.
- Confirmed it failed before the fix.
- Applied the fix and confirmed the temporary test passed.
- Restored the temporary test change as requested.
- Ran:
  ```bash
  cargo test -p dioxus-autofmt --test samples
  ```
  Result: all 39 tests passed.

Notes:
- I did not commit anything.
- Only `packages/autofmt/src/writer.rs` was intentionally modified by this fix.
- There were pre-existing unrelated working tree changes in `packages/desktop/src/readme.md` and `reports/`; I left them untouched.

result:
Implemented the fix in `packages/autofmt/src/writer.rs`.

What changed:
- `write_for_loop` now detects tuple patterns (`Pat::Tuple`) and formats them through the existing expression formatter instead of directly using `TokenStream::to_string()`.
- This preserves rustfmt-style comma spacing, producing:
  ```rust
  for (index, name, value) in data {
  ```
  instead of:
  ```rust
  for (index , name , value) in data {
  ```

Validation:
- Added a temporary reproduction case to `packages/autofmt/tests/samples/ifchain_forloop.rsx`.
- Confirmed it failed before the fix.
- Applied the fix and confirmed the temporary test passed.
- Restored the temporary test change as requested.
- Ran:
  ```bash
  cargo test -p dioxus-autofmt --test samples
  ```
  Result: all 39 tests passed.

Notes:
- I did not commit anything.
- Only `packages/autofmt/src/writer.rs` was intentionally modified by this fix.
- There were pre-existing unrelated working tree changes in `packages/desktop/src/readme.md` and `reports/`; I left them untouched.
